title: cynanchica lutea subsp. lutea
intro: Cynanchica lutea subsp. lutea, also known as Golden Swallow Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynanchica lutea subsp. lutea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Cynanchica lutea subsp. lutea can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
